scenario: Verify that search succeeds with valid data
expected_result: Search operation completes successfully with valid data

scenario: Verify search operation with all valid inputs
expected_result: Search completes and returns success response

scenario: Verify error when data is missing
expected_result: System returns validation error indicating data is required

scenario: Verify error when data is empty
expected_result: System rejects empty data with appropriate error message

scenario: Verify error when data has invalid format
expected_result: System rejects invalid data format and shows format hint

scenario: Verify data at minimum allowed length (1 character)
expected_result: System accepts data at minimum boundary

scenario: Verify data at maximum allowed length
expected_result: System accepts data at maximum boundary

scenario: Verify data exceeding maximum allowed length
expected_result: System rejects data exceeding maximum length with error

scenario: Verify data with only whitespace characters
expected_result: System trims whitespace and validates data correctly

scenario: Verify data with Unicode / special characters
expected_result: System handles Unicode in data without crashing
System handles duplicate search gracefully without data corruption
System maintains data integrity during concurrent search operations

scenario: Verify SQL injection attempt in data — input: ' OR '1'='1
expected_result: System sanitises input and rejects SQL injection in data

scenario: Verify XSS attempt in data — input: <script>alert('xss')</script>
expected_result: System sanitises HTML/JS and prevents XSS via data

scenario: Verify search is not accessible without authentication
expected_result: System returns 401/403 for unauthenticated search attempt
